title: Public Service Enterprise Group, Inc. (PEG) Q2 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Public Service Enterprise Group, Inc. (NYSE:PEG ) Q2 2023 Earnings Conference Call August 1, 2023 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Carlotta Chan - VP, IR Ralph LaRossa - Chair, President & CEO Daniel Cregg - EVP & CFO Conference Call Participants Shahriar Pourreza - Guggenheim Securities Jeremy Tonet - JPMorgan Chase & Co. David Arcaro - Morgan Stanley Julien Dumoulin-Smith - Bank of America Merrill Lynch Durgesh Chopra - Evercore ISI Carly Davenport - Goldman Sachs Group Anthony Crowdell - Mizuho Securities Ryan Levine - Citigroup Paul Patterson - Glenrock Associates Operator Ladies and gentlemen, thank you for standing by. My name is Rob, and I am your event operator today.

title: PSEG (PEG) Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Rise Y/Y
text: PSEG's (PEG) second-quarter 2023 adjusted earnings beat the Zacks Consensus Estimate by 14.8%. Revenues increase by 16.6% on a year-over-year basis.

title: PSEG (PEG) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: PSEG (PEG) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.70 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $0.61 per share. This compares to earnings of $0.64 per share a year ago.

title: PSEG Announces Second Quarter 2023 Results
text: $1.18 Per Share Net Income  $0.70 Per Share Non-GAAP Operating Earnings  Re-Affirms Full-Year 2023 Non-GAAP Operating EPS Guidance Range of $3.40 - $3.50  NEWARK, N.J., Aug. 1, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Public Service Enterprise Group (NYSE: PEG) reported second quarter 2023 Net Income of $591 million, or $1.18 per share, compared to Net Income of $131 million, or $0.26 per share, for the second quarter 2022.
